# UiHost.MediationDecision constructor

Outcome of a host mediation decision.

```csharp
public MediationDecision(bool Route, DeclineReason? Reason)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| Route | `true` when the host may route the request onward to the server. |
| Reason | The decline reason when *Route* is `false`; `null` on the routed (success) path, where no reason applies. |
